type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Canfor installed a Flue Gas Recirculation (FGR) system and a new fuel infeed system on Combustor No. 1 to reduce tramp air (i.e., air that is entering the unit not taking part in combustion). This resulted in decreased Oxygen (O2), temperatures and overall decreased Nitrogen Oxides (NOx) and Carbon Monoxide (CO) emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Canfor installed a Flue Gas Recirculation (FGR) system and a new fuel infeed system on Combustor No. 1 to reduce tramp air (i.e., air that is entering the unit not taking part in combustion). This resulted in decreased Oxygen (O2), temperatures and overall decreased Nitrogen Oxides (NOx) and Carbon Monoxide (CO) emissions.
